svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="IPzzwQng0l-V_wswn15p"> <mxGraphModel dx="1245" dy="659" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>State Machine Diagram</b><br>Affected Follow Truck Communication Loss" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="480" x="330" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Start" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;shape=startState;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="70" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Normal Platoon Driving<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">receives lead truck data</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="160" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Communication Warning<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">messages delayed or weak</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="430" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Communication Lost<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">timeout reached</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="700" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Safe Mode<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">increase distance<br>prepare independent driving</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="190" x="700" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Reconnection Attempt<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">send request to lead truck</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="430" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Request Rejoin<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">lead truck approval needed</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="160" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Leave Platoon<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">safe exit maneuver</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="430" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="Standalone Driving<br><font style="font-size: 10px;">drives independently</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="700" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="End" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;shape=endState;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="980" y="495" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="Start" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" value="weak / delayed&nbsp;<div>messages</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="-15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="1" as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="350" y="164.5" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="164.5" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S1" value="messages stable again"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="525" y="85" /> <mxPoint x="255" y="85" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="S2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S3" value="timeout reached"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="-15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="S3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S4" value="loss confirmed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0667" y="-45" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="S4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S5" value="start&nbsp;<div>reconnection</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="-25" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="S5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S6" value="connection&nbsp;<div>restored</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="-25" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E8" edge="1" parent="1" source="S6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S1" value="lead approves"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.125" y="-45" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="255" y="240" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E9" edge="1" parent="1" source="S5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S7" value="retry limit reached"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0476" y="-55" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E10" edge="1" parent="1" source="S7" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="S8" value="exit completed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" y="20" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E11" edge="1" parent="1" source="S8" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=1.3;" target="End" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
